data.title: Trump Transfers Entire DJT Stake To Revocable Trust Ahead Of Inauguration
data.description: President-elect Donald Trump has transferred his entire stake in Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. to his revocable trust, according to Securities and Exchange Commission filings released on Thursday.

data.title: El Salvador Buys Bitcoin Dip, Scoops $1 Million Worth Of BTC A Day After IMF Urges Scaling Back
data.description: El Salvador made full use of the market drop Thursday by buying as many as 11 Bitcoins (CRYPTO: BTC), worth over a million dollars, for its reserve.

data.title: Marques Brownlee Breaks Down How Google's AI Video Generator Veo2 Outpaces OpenAI's Sora
data.description: Marques Brownlee highlights how Google's Veo 2 AI video generator outperforms OpenAI's Sora in realism and accuracy, leveraging YouTube's extensive data for superior results.

data.title: Samsung One UI 6.1.1 Update Is Turning This Galaxy Series Phones Into Paperweights: Bricking, Random Reboots And Overheating Reported
data.description: Samsung Galaxy S22 users are reporting severe issues, including permanent device bricking, random reboots, and overheating, after installing the One UI 6.1.1 update, with costly motherboard replacements suggested as the only fix.

data.title: Tom Lee Explains Why 'Fewer Cuts In 2025' Could Boost The Market, Urges Investors To 'Buy The Dip' Amid Recent Volatility
data.description: U.S. stock markets could benefit from fewer interest rate cuts in 2025 despite recent volatility, according to Fundstrat's head of research Tom Lee, who sees the Federal Reserve's hawkish stance as potentially beneficial for investors.
